goal: Define a narrow, auditable official boundary for ResponseAPI and record a tracked readiness decision instead of continuing unbounded helper expansion.
successCriteria: ResponseAPI promotion candidates and deferred helpers are explicit and machine-readable.
Doctor, scorecard, verification report, and promotion decision artifacts agree on the current ResponseAPI status.
The package can record a held decision without widening the provider-only ResponseAPI surface.
explicitlyOutOfScope: Adding new ResponseAPI helpers or broadening the default provider surface.
Auto-promoting ResponseAPI without a tracked decision artifact and matching evidence basis.
